title: [codereview] gateway.rs:99 is_local_mesh added but not used in forward_mesh_to_upstream or mesh_to_upstream
description: lichend.rs:350 and gateway.rs:34 still unconditionally route all mesh packets to TUN. New method not called. Per spec/05-routing.md pseudocode, must classify before TUN/Yggdrasil. File as codereview tag.
